title: Japanese Lamb Katsu Casserole
description: A unique fusion of Japanese flavors and traditional lamb katsu, this casserole is a hearty and satisfying meal.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with Egyptian spices.
Dredge the lamb in crispy Japanese breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the lamb until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the lamb to a baking dish and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the teriyaki sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Pour the teriyaki sauce over the lamb in the baking dish.
In a separate pot, heat the sushi rice according to package instructions.
To assemble the casserole, layer the sushi rice, lamb, and green onions in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, until the top is lightly browned.
